content.text:
engine: pdo_mysql
tables:
  "\"users\"":
    columns:
      id:
        type: Integer
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      name:
        type: String
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      email:
        type: String
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      age:
        type: Integer
        nullable: true
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
    indexes:
      primary:
        columns[1]: "\"id\""
        is_unique: true
        is_primary: true
    foreign_keys[0]:
    triggers[1]{name,event,timing,statement}:
      trg_users_insert,INSERT,AFTER,"BEGIN\n                SET @last_user_id = NEW.id;\n            END"
    check_constraints[1]{name,definition}:
      chk_users_age,(`age` >= 0)
views:
  "\"active_users\"":
    sql: "select `mcp_test`.`users`.`id` AS `id`,`mcp_test`.`users`.`name` AS `name`,`mcp_test`.`users`.`email` AS `email` from `mcp_test`.`users` where (`mcp_test`.`users`.`name` <> '')"
routines:
  stored_procedures[0]:
  functions[0]:
  sequences[0]:
